input.background: Let us return to the birth weight illustrative data concerning 10 SIDS cases. We have established that \(\bar{x}=2890.5\) grams and \(s=720.0\). Confidence intervals for \(\mu\) at \(90 \%, 95 \%\), and \(99 \%\) levels of confidence will be calculated.
input.question: Calculate the standard error of the mean \(SE_{\bar{x}}\).

output.answer: The standard error of the mean \(SE_{\bar{x}}=\frac{720}{\sqrt{10}}=227.684\).
